mission.title: helm: Nested `null` values do not remove keys from sub-charts
mission.description: Nested `null` values do not remove keys from sub-charts. This issue affects 57+ users.

steps.title: Identify helm troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your helm installation:
```bash
helm version --short
helm repo list
```
Look for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review helm configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant helm configuration:
Nested `null` values do not remove keys from sub-charts.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Nested `null` values do not remove keys from sub-charts
steps.description:
> Can [#12879](https://github.com/helm/helm/pull/12879) or [#13654](https://github.com/helm/helm/pull/13654) solve this?

Yes, these PRs fix the issue, with unit tests to prevent future breakage, and have been merged 👏 This fix is scheduled to be in Helm 3.17.1.
```yaml
fluentd:
  livenessProbe:
    httpGet: null
    tcpSocket:
      port: 24224
    initialDelaySeconds: 20
  readinessProbe:
    httpGet: null
    tcpSocket:
      port: 24224
    initialDelaySeconds: 20
```

steps.title: Confirm Nested `null` values do not remove keys from… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test helm to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.
